title: fridericia mollis
intro: Fridericia mollis is a plant species in the Bignoniaceae family, also known as the trumpet vine or angel's trumpet. It is a flowering plant native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. Fridericia mollis contains scopolamine, a tropane alkaloid with medicinal properties that can be used to treat various health conditions, including anxiety, insomnia, and muscle spasms. Herbal preparations of Fridericia mollis include tinctures, teas, and extracts, which can be used to promote relaxation, reduce stress, and improve overall well-being.
